race.comment: A few key scratchings rob this race of a lot of interest. The stand-out now is JUST MAZ (5) who has been freshened up since her win at Canterbury on 23 January. Stalked the pace on that occasion then just did enough in the run home. Has more upside than her rivals and should be too strong again. The speedy SCRUMPTIOUS (3) is in form, leading for home in consecutive races over 1250m at Canterbury for a win and a third. She is the most likely leader and should run another cheeky race. Stablemate KAKADU SUNSET (2) is back from a 20-week spell. Tested in the Group 3 Reginald Allen at the end of the last campaign and wasn't beaten far. Has the class to test her four rivals. It looks a race in three. AHELLBENDA (8) comes out of a Provincial Championship qualifier at Hawkesbury where she was safely held. Better placed in something easier. KITTY OKAY (12) was easily accounted for at Kembla last time and is better off back at the provincials.
